chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Misc: Application No.S-117 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For hearing of main case. 21.07.2025 Mr. Mashooq Ali Ghangro, Advocate for the respondent No.3. Mr. Mansoor Ahmed Shaikh, Deputy Prosecutor General...-..-...-..-..-..-..-..- Perusal of the order sheet reflects that the counsel for applicant was absent on 16.06.2025 and as an indulgence matter was adjourned to 14.07.2025. On the said date no one effected appearance on behalf of applicant. Intimation notice was issued to counsel for applicant, but still no one appeared. Therefore the instant Cr. Misc: application is dismissed in non-prosecution. JUDGE S.Nawaz(St)’
